text: There once was a wise owl. She lived in a tall oak tree. Every day, she watched animals. She loved squirrels. They chased nuts. She loved them. One day, foxes chased her. She couldn'd fly. She danced in circles. They stopped. She flew away. She made a nest. She raised chicks. She'd hear them chatter. She'd wink. They'd do it back. She'd laugh.
